ham: Hi, I'm Raj from XYZ Broadband. Just wanted to let you know that I will be visiting your residence tomorrow at 10:00 AM to do a quick checkup of the router and upgrade firmware. Please make sure someone is available to give me access. Thank you!
spam: Dear User, aapke gaadi ko traffic e-challan mila hai. Rs 2500 24 ghante mein jamaa karo, varna penalty lagegi. Pay karne ke liye <URL> ya YES reply kare. Thank you!
